query:
SELECT gg.id AS "id: Uuid" FROM gpu_groups gg
           WHERE gg.server_id = ?
             AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gpu_group_members m WHERE m.group_id = gg.id)
             AND NOT EXISTS (
                 SELECT 1 FROM deployments d
                 WHERE d.gpu_group_id = gg.id
                   AND d.state NOT IN ('REMOVED','REPLACED','FAILED')
             )
             AND NOT EXISTS (
                 SELECT 1 FROM server_volumes v WHERE v.gpu_group_id = gg.id
             )
